productName: Refine LOUD RESIN x High Country Horticulture - MAC Herer - 1g [ H ]
description: A flavor-forward hybrid live resin, made from fresh-frozen MAC Herer in a closed-loop system so the dab tastes almost exactly like the plant smelled in the field. Bright, layered, and strain-expressive, a sweet, citrus-earthy, creamy aroma with a balanced, euphoric feel, leading into a smooth, well-rounded vibe.
